news_items.headline: Brewers option P Gasser; tipped pitches possible
news_items.summary: Brewers option lefty Robert Gasser back to Triple-A a day after blowing an early lead against Dodgers. Milwaukee manager Pat Murphy said it's possible Gasser was tipping his pitches.

news_items.headline: Judge halts homer drought with walk-off vs. Rays
news_items.summary: The Yankees' Aaron Judge ended a career-worst 11-game streak with no RBIs by hitting a game-ending, two-run homer in the ninth inning vs. the Rays.

news_items.headline: Jays' Cease exits early; Vladdy pulled after HBP
news_items.summary: Blue Jays starter Dylan Cease left in the fifth inning because of left hamstring discomfort, while Vladimir Guerrero Jr. also exited after being hit in the elbow by a pitch.

news_items.headline: Detmers retires 24 of 25, K's 14 as Angels sweep
news_items.summary: Reid Detmers was nearly perfect for eight innings while striking out a career-high 14, and the Angels beat the Rangers 2-1 on Sunday night on Justin Foscue's ninth-inning throwing error for their first series sweep this season.

news_items.headline: Red Sox ace Crochet 'feeling good,' to throw BP
news_items.summary: Red Sox ace left-hander Garrett Crochet is set to throw batting practice off the Fenway Park mound Tuesday as he returns from inflammation in his shoulder.

news_items.headline: Dodgers' Hernández likely to make '26 debut Mon.
news_items.summary: Dodgers utilityman Kiké Hernández is expected to be activated in time to make his season debut Monday after recovering from surgery on his left elbow.

news_items.headline: Rockies' Quintana leaves start with elbow issue
news_items.summary: Rockies left-hander Jose Quintana left his start against the Diamondbacks in the second inning Sunday with left elbow discomfort.
